name: Urmenos

sheet.name: Urmenos
sheet.background_story:
In desperation a father begged the darkness for his son's life, decay responded and the boy was given a new life, literally.
The strength of two souls restored the damaged body, but the vile energy of alien wills and faiths unleashed an internal struggle and a gradual corruption that no one should have lived through.
Uncertainty, revenge and fear drive the blade of a new chaos.
